title: Full Phase 2 verification and manual macOS smoke checklist
action: Run full automated verification and record manual Finder smoke coverage for Phase 2.
implementation: Run xcodebuild FinderSync Debug build with CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO.
Manual smoke: create temp files/folders, enable Finder extension, invoke copy/info/folder operations/trash/delete with confirmation, and inspect actions.jsonl.

criteria: xcodebuild -project native/macos/sRightNative.xcodeproj -scheme SRightFinderSync -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO exits zero
manual smoke notes include copy.path, file.info, folder.create_from_filename, folder.dissolve, file.move_to_trash, file.delete_permanently
